prompt: On the client side the framework has to work out, from the configured forwarding rules, which real address a requested one should map to, and part of that involves turning a fixed template value into a concrete string with no capture placeholders. Where is the client-side resolution of a requested address against the rules, and where is a non-capturing template compiled to its literal value?

evidence.claim: resolves a requested address against the rules client-side
compiles a non-capturing template to a literal value

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
